channel.title: chiraggude/awesome-laravel Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: chiraggude/awesome-laravel May 4th - May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Popular Packages

Utilities
  • Laravel Mailboxstars794 - A package to handle incoming emails
  • stancl/tenancystars1.7k - Automatic tenancy for your Laravel app. No code changes needed.

    • Development Setup

  • Vessel - Simple Docker development environments for Laravel

    • Application Hosting

  • Vapor

    • Conferences

  • Laravel Live India

    • Community

    Local User Groups
  • LaravelES Slack (Signup)
  • Laravel India, Slack Signup, Twitter, Facebook, Youtube
  • Laravel UK, Slack Signup

item.title: chiraggude/awesome-laravel Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Starter Projects

  • Spark

    • Popular Packages

    Monitoring
  • Horizonstars3.3k - Monitor and configure queues with a simple web UI
  • Laravel Failed Job Monitorstars610 - Get notified when a queued job fails
  • Laravel Uptime Monitorstars843 - A powerful and easy to configure uptime and ssl monitor

    • Popular Packages

    Testing & Debugging
  • Laravel TestTools - Chrome extension to generate Laravel integration tests while using your app
  • Laravel Test Factory Generatorstars877 - Generate Laravel test factories from your existing models

    • Popular Packages

    Utilities
  • Laravel Video Chatstars660 - Video Chat using Socket.IO and WebRTC
  • Widgets for Laravelstars978 - A powerful alternative to view composers.

    • Popular Packages

    Media & Document Management
  • Intervention Imagestars11.9k - Image handling library for creating, editing and composing images
  • Laravel Glidestars337 - Easily convert images with Glide
  • Laravel MediaLibrarystars4.4k - Associate files with Eloquent models
  • Laravel Snappystars2k - HTML to PDF generator using wkhtmltopdf
  • Laravel DOMPDFstars4.5k - HTML to PDF generator using dompdfstars7.9k
  • Laravel Staplerstars564 - ORM-based file upload manager
  • Laravel Excelstars9.8k - Import and export Excel and CSV files

    • Essentials

  • Lumen (Documentation)
  • Laravel News (Archive)

    • Application Hosting

  • Heroku (Documentation)

item.title: chiraggude/awesome-laravel Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Essentials

  • Laravel (Documentation)

    • Code Snippets

  • Laravel LTS Cheat Sheet (Chinese version)
  • Laravel Tricks

    • Codebases for Reference

  • GitScrumstars2.6k - Task management with Git and Scrum
  • Monicastars12.9k - Personal relationship management system
  • Laravel.iostars1.9k - Source for the Laravel.io Community Portal
  • Jigsawstars1.7k - Static site generator

    • Conferences

  • Laraconf Brasil
  • Laracon Australia

    • Videos

  • Test-Driven Laravel
  • Duilio Palacios (ES)
  • CodigoFacilito (ES)
  • Servers for Hackers
  • Udemy
  • Lynda
  • Pluralsight

    • Books

  • Laravel 5.4 For Beginners by Bill Keck
  • Laravel Up & Running by Matt Stauffer
  • Laravel Companion by Johnathon Koster
  • Deploy Laravel on AWS with CloudFormation by Lionel Martin
  • React Native and Laravel for Future Mobile Development by Ega Radiegtya
  • Servers for Hackers by Chris Fidao
  • Full-Stack Vue.js 2 and Laravel 5 by Anthony Gore

    • Popular Packages

    Developer Tools
  • Laravel Tinxstars436 - Reload your Laravel Tinker session from inside Tinker
  • Laravel API Documentation Generatorstars3k - Automatically generate your API documentation
  • Laravel API/Scaffold/CRUD Generatorstars3.1k - Generator for APIs, CRUD scaffolds etc.

    • Popular Packages

    Utilities
  • Laravel Moderationstars490 - Approve or reject resources like posts, comments, users, etc.
  • Laravel Phonestars1.6k - Phone number validator and formatter
  • Laravel Banstars601 - Simplify blocking and banning Eloquent models
  • Artisan Viewstars722 - Manage the views in Laravel projects via artisan
  • Captchastars1.9k - An anti-bot image captcha system
  • Multi-tenantstars2.2k - Flexible multi tenancy with secure separation of routes, assets and databases
  • Laravel Form Builderstars1.6k - Form builder inspired by Symfony's form builder
  • Laravel Datatablesstars3.9k - jQuery DataTables API
  • Laravel GeoIPstars1.8k - Determine the location of website visitors based on their IP addresses
  • Laravel Tagsstars1.1k - Add tags and taggable behaviour
  • Purifierstars1.5k - HTML filter
  • Friendshipstars653 - Friendship management system
  • Laravel UUIDstars1.7k - Generate a UUID according to the RFC 4122 standard
  • Laravel Installerstars1.6k - Allow users to install your application just by following the setup wizard, like WordPress
  • Laravel Modulesstars3.6k - Easy module management
  • Laravel Proxystars7.1k - Handling sessions when behind load balancers or other intermediaries.

    • Popular Packages

    Integration with Javascript
  • Javascript Validationstars870 - Use validation rules, messages, FormRequest and validators to validate forms in client-side
  • Laravel Pjaxstars489 - A Pjax middleware
  • Laravel Blade Javascriptstars488 - A Blade directive to export variables to JavaScript
  • Ziggystars2.3k - Use your Laravel named routes in JavaScript

    • Popular Packages

    APIs
  • Laravel Fractalstars1.7k - Output complex, flexible, AJAX/RESTful data structures with Fractal
  • Laravel Responderstars685 - Build custom API responses with Fractal

    • Popular Packages

    Tasks, Commands and Scheduling
  • Elixirstars1.1k - Node (NPM) package to run Gulp tasks
  • Mixstars4.7k - Fluent API for defining basic webpack build steps

    • Popular Packages

    Localization
  • Laravel Translatablestars1.4k - Making Eloquent models translatable by storing translations as JSON
  • Laravel Translationstars340 - Translation and localization management

    • Popular Packages

    Third-party Service Integration
  • Laravel Analyticsstars2.5k - Retrieve pageviews and other data from Google Analytics

    • Development Setup

  • Stackerstars356 - The environment for local web development on Docker
  • Devilboxstars3.4k - A dockerized and general-purpose LAMP/MEAN stack for every PHP version
  • Homestead - Official Vagrant box for Laravel
  • Valet - Development environment for Mac users

    • Starter Projects

  • REST API With Lumenstars469
  • LaraAdminstars1.4k
  • Grafite Builderstars1k
  • Laravel Boilerplatestars5.1k
  • Laravel Angular Material Starterstars1.7k
  • AdminLTE Laravelstars1.8k
  • Laravel API Starter Kitstars338
  • Backpack for Laravelstars850
  • SomelineStarterstars853
  • Laravel Adminstars9.9k
  • Voyagerstars10.4k
  • Apiatostars2.4k

    • Popular Packages

    Testing & Debugging
  • LogViewerstars2k - Provides a log viewer
  • LERNstars432 - Record exceptions into a database and will send you a notification
  • Laravel Tailstars592 - The missing tail command

    • Popular Packages

    Authentication & Authorization
  • Doormanstars924 - Limit access to your Laravel applications by using invite codes

    • Popular Packages

    Databases, ORMs, Migrations & Seeding
  • Laravel OCI8stars645 - Oracle DB driver via OCI8
  • Laravel Repositorystars3.8k - Repositories to abstract the database layer

    • Popular Packages

    Optimization
  • Rememberablestars970 - Query caching for Eloquent
  • Widgetizestars802 - Page Partial caching
  • Laravel Responsecachestars1.7k - Speed up app by caching the entire response

    • Tutorials & Blogs

  • Tuts+
  • Matt Stauffer
  • Vegi Bit
  • Dor.ky
  • Stillat

    • Application Hosting

  • FortRabbit
  • AWS Elastic Beanstalk (Tutorial)

    • Content Management Systems

  • OctoberCMSstars10.7k
  • PyroCMSstars3.1k
  • Lavalitestars2.2k
  • Asgard CMSstars728
  • Microweberstars2k
  • Coaster CMSstars383
  • Laralumstars305

  • Build APIs You Won't Hate by Phil Sturgeon
  • Integrating Front end Components with Web Applications by Maksim Surguy
  • Building Web Applications Using Parse REST API by Mhd Zaher Ghaibeh
  • Laravel - My First Framework by Maksim Surguy
  • Easy Laravel 5 by W. Jason Gilmore
  • Laravel 5 Essentials by Martin Bean
  • Laravel 5.1 Beauty by Chuck Heintzelman
  • Design Patterns with PHP and Laravel by Kelt Dockins

  • Laravel 5 Learn Easy by Sanjib Sinha

Utilities

  • Bootstrapperstars566 - Set of classes to create Bootstrap 3 markup
  • Laravel Stats Trackerstars2.5k - Gather information from requests to identify and store
  • noCAPTCHAstars316 - Helper for Google's new noCAPTCHA (reCAPTCHA)
  • Revisionablestars2.2k - Create a revision history for Eloquent models

    • Popular Packages

    Developer Tools

    • Popular Packages
